This file includes analysis of the following webinars held year-to-date.

Core audience

Over the course of the last six webinars, 29 people have attended 3 or more webinars. Do we know these individuals? Have reached out by phone to speak with them? Do we want to send FGL-branded gifts to them with a personal note?
